steps.t: Threkmóth asked you to check on Vaskorn's condition.
Threkmóth can be found in Skoghús, in the south of Thornholt. Vaskorn is not feeling well. You should return to Threkmóth and update him.
Radagast can be found in the north of the Thornholt woods. With Vaskorn's condition not improving, Radagast should be notified in case there is someth…
You should return to Stráhek the Stout in Skarháld and tell him what took place in the woods.
